docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIS CHAN, FRANCISCO JAVIER AS TO DEFENDANT AGRICOLE GROUP, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA BAR AGRICOLE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIS CHAN, FRANCISCO JAVIER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AGRICOLE GROUP, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA BAR AGRICOLE $9,472.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,697.00, NO CHECK WAS RECEIVED.SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
